deposit(bytes32,uint256).details: The caller provides a cryptographic commitment.      The commitment is H(secret, nullifier) computed off-chain.      The vault inserts it into the Merkle tree and takes payment.      After this call the depositor's funds are invisible.

params.commitment: The Poseidon hash of (secret, nullifier).                    Computed off-chain by the SDK.                    This is the ONLY link to the deposit.                    If you lose the secret note you lose the funds.
params.denomination: The deposit size. Must be SMALL/MEDIUM/LARGE.                     Fixed denominations maximise anonymity set.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pauseDeposits().details: Emergency use only. Cannot trap user funds.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

withdraw(bytes32,bytes32,address,uint256.details: The caller provides a ZK proof that:      1. They know a secret that hashes to a commitment in the tree      2. The nullifier has not been spent before      3. The recipient address is bound to this specific proof      No link exists between the depositor and recipient.      The nullifier is burned permanently after this call.

params.nullifierHash: H(secret, 1) — unique per deposit.                       Burned after use. Cannot be reused.
params.proof: The ZK proof bytes. Verified on-chain.                       In beta this is a placeholder — full                       UltraHonk verifier added in V1.
params.recipient: The fresh wallet to receive funds.                       Should have zero prior transaction history.
params.root: The Merkle root the proof was generated against.                       Must be a known historical root.

commitmentExists(bytes32).notice: Check if a commitment exists in the tree

deposit(bytes32,uint256).notice: Deposit tokens into the shielded vault.

isKnownRoot(bytes32).notice: Check if a root is a known valid root

isSpent(bytes32).notice: Check if a nullifier has been spent

pauseDeposits().notice: Pause deposits only — withdrawals always remain open

totalDeposits().notice: Returns the total number of deposits ever made

withdraw(bytes32,bytes32,address,uint256.notice: Withdraw tokens from the shielded vault to a fresh address.
